nasb.text: Like a thorn which falls into the hand of a drunkard, So is a proverb in the mouth of fools.

esv.text: Like a thorn that goes up into the hand of a drunkard is a proverb in the mouth of fools.

cnv.text: 箴言在愚昧人口中， 就像荊棘在醉漢手裡。

ccb.text: 愚人口中说箴言， 如同醉汉握荆棘。

csbs.text: 箴言在愚昧人的口中， 就如蒺藜落在醉汉的手里。
